item.title: Delicious
item.description: #prochoice #prolife #meme #funny #BakeSale alt text: Screenshot of 2 Threads posts. The first by danaintg: Signed up to help at a pro-life bake sale. I'll be selling cups of uncooked batter and insisting that they're actually cupcakes. The second by blackbeltbirder: Life begins at confection.
item.dc:creator: davidaugust

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
mmm hmm
some doritos have more flavor dust than others, but yeah
big big fan of this movie (Creepshow, 1982)
I also want this. The books made it all sound so good
baby elephants are just the cutest
I don’t think this has ever happened to me, sadly
that’s a completely valid question and I don’t have the answer
facts are facts
that’s a bumper car
mother of god..
they haven’t made em like that for quite a while
I can’t really blame her
not again
uh oh
mine make even less sense
one stop shopping places are the best
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: They’ll all still line up behind him. He didn’t even have to show up for a single debate a blew everyone else out of the water.
item.description: The fact that Trump still has control over our government while having 91 charges, liable for sexual assault, and all the other things he’s done says all you need to know about the state of the US right now.
item.dc:creator: CapnAdorable

item.title: Thrilled with this latest round of work! ??✨(and really glad I didn't give up on ceramics this summer ?)
item.description: EDIT: Wow! You all are incredibly kind! I don't have an online store (yet!) but that's a goal and in the meantime if you want you can follow my instagram. I'll post there when my work is available at local events or online ✨ https://www.instagram.com/trufflepigpottery/
item.dc:creator: PandaPanda379

item.title: Florida: We're #1 in Leprosy!
item.description: Central Florida in particular has seen a disproportionate share of cases, which indicates it might be an endemic location for the disease, meaning leprosy has a consistent presence in the region's population rather than popping up in the form of one-off outbreaks. "Central Florida, in particular, accounted for 81% of cases reported in Florida and almost one fifth of nationally reported cases." “Some people have direct contact with armadillos and that makes sense,” he said. “For the others, the question is whether there are environmental sources of leprosy that we haven’t seen, like soil or plants from areas that armadillos have inhabited.” https://www.health.com/leprosy-outbreak-florida-2023-7569183
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

owo creechures
Imagine if he did that. If he just killed Donald Trump. Madness.
This is what gaming in the 90s was like basically
Markerpliers
Yeah that's basically it.
Be gay, do drugs, Hail Satan.
This is it, this is my favourite meme
This is a call out post for Arch Users.
Maurice is so smol
UwU
Yeah this is what I look like when stoned
I fuckin' love contraptions!

Imeran
Mike Hoffman - "She Devils"
40.
So PineNut
Part 4/4
Paul Rumsey - "BodyHead"
50.
item.dc:creator: TheWoodsAreVile

item.title: Totally amazing ! Seriously, thanks everyone
item.description: I've been writing songs in bands and projects for 25 something years now, played shows around town in bands that played covers, original songs, etc. No one ever cared. We played to the other bands that were there, or the bar staff, or whoever wandered in. If we played original songs, then why weren't we playing covers? If we played covers, why weren't we playing originals? Even in a small town, it's about impossible to get a following unless places give you a chance, or like you, or whatever. Basically, no one cared about anything I did. In my newest project, I strictly release things online, and it is in general very difficult to get even people I know to check it out. It's a big ask, I guess. Imgur has given me a forum and a place for people to check out what I do, and people have started to follow. So thankful for that, and thanks to everyone who has checked it out and been supportive. I just released the latest song here: https://youtu.be/hK3LF58f4JU?si=Xm2B88E4fjkzLG2X
item.dc:creator: FromTheBeyond
